common.confirmPasswordChangeDesc: Are you sure you want to change your password? You will be required to use this new password the next time you log in.
common.confirmSaveDesc: Are you sure you want to save these changes? This will permanently update the user's profile and system access levels.
common.confirmUnblockDesc: Are you sure you want to unblock this user?
common.confirmBlockDesc: Are you sure you want to Block this user?
common.confirmPasswordChangeAdminDesc: Are you sure you want to forcibly change the password for this user? They will lose access using their current credentials.
common.confirmPasswordResetDesc: Are you sure you want to change your password? Once changed, you must use the new password to log in.
common.confirmEmailChangeDesc: Are you sure you want to change your email address?

auth.title: Preserving Academic Integrity
auth.subtitle: Analyzing scholarly contributions with precision and prestigious authority at the Technical University of Lodz.

login.heading: Login
login.errorBlocked: Your account has been blocked. Please contact the administrator.
login.errorGeneric: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
login.errorGoogle: Google login failed. Please try again.

code.validationError: The code must consist of exactly 8 digits

retry.success: A new code has been sent! Check your inbox.

activate.errorSub: The activation link is invalid, expired, or your account is already active.

unblock.heading: Unblock your account after inactivity

unblock.loadingSub: Unblocking account is processed by a system.
unblock.successSub: Your account has been successfully unblocked. You can now log in.
unblock.errorSub: The link is invalid, expired, or your account does not require unblocking.

verify.subheadingTime: The code is valid for 5 minutes.

profile.securityDesc: Changing your password regularly can increase the security of your account.

error.changePasswordFailed: Failed to change the password. Check if the old password and data version are correct.

password.minLength: Password must be at least 12 characters long
password.maxLength: Password can be up to 64 characters long

password.lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
password.number: Password must contain at least one number
password.specialChar: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter and a special symbol

user.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters
user.nameFormat: Name must start with a letter and contain only letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes
user.surnameMin: Surname must be at least 3 characters
user.surnameFormat: Surname must start with a letter and contain only letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes
user.loginMin: Login must be at least 3 characters
user.loginFormat: Login can only contain letters and numbers

terms.required: You must accept the terms and conditions

emailCode.length: Code must be exactly 10 characters long
emailCode.format: Code can only contain letters and numbers
